So in the original code, after checking if convId starts with "GMT+" or "GMT-", it takes substring(3), which correctly gets the offset part. But with the mutant change, using substring(-3) may not always get the correct part, especially when the length varies.

So the mutant change at line 124 is causing issues because it's incorrectly extracting the offset part when using substring(-3) instead of substring(3). Therefore, this mutant is introducing a bug that causes some tests to fail. Hence, it should be considered as a fault-prone mutation.
